subcodes.title: Words spoken at Pleiades Sylvan Bower, Alhammeh near Tiberias, 1914-05-07 ca.
subcodes.first_line: Man is liable to forget things very quickly, but the animals remember longer. If you have been kind to a dog once in your lifetime
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @compassion; kindness, @kindness to and rights of animals
